meaning: n.重复,叠句,[乐]副歌vi.节制,避免,制止
examples: When breaking in an engine, you should refrain from high speeds for the first thousand miles.
Complaints about poor food in schools have become a familiar refrain.
You hear the refrain all the time.
She repeated what has become a familiar refrain at the campaign's rallies and in its ads.
The rules also specify that students should refrain from wearing a "full or half veil".
